text:
Author: db
Date: Sun Apr 13 22:03:21 2014
New Revision: 351241
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351241
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351241/

Log:
  Upgrade from 1.8.6 to 1.8.7:
  * bug fixed system segfault when BSR is activated when no BSR was received
  * bug fixed in FTP upload when using Filezilla ftp server
  
  PR:		ports/188571
  Submitted by:	Stephen Hurd <shurd@sasktel.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/comms/qsstv/Makefile
  head/comms/qsstv/distinfo

==============================================================================

+++ head/comms/qsstv/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 22:03:21 2014	(r351241)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qsstv
-PORTVERSION=	8.2.6
+PORTVERSION=	8.2.7
 CATEGORIES=	comms hamradio

 		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
